mapper.insert: insert into jst_payment_pay_record ( pay_no, business_type, business_id, target_type, target_id, amount, pay_account, pay_time, voucher_url, operator_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag ) values ( #{payNo}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{amount}, #{payAccount}, #{payTime}, #{voucherUrl}, #{operatorId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, '0' )
